Jonny winds Adam up about an important call he is expecting from America, while Jim drives them mad as he keeps letting his dog Wilson do his 'dollops' in the flowerbed in Mum and Dad's drive. Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter star in Robert Popper's award-winning comedy

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam and Jonny finally bring their 'females' home to meet their parents, and just to add to the potential confusion both girls are called Lucy. Before the objects of their affection can make it out of the car, the boys rush into the house to give Mum and Dad a last-minute rundown of the 'rules'. Though Mum seems delighted, Dad fails to make the best first impression. Nevertheless, the evening is saved from complete disaster thanks to some exciting revelations. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Frank of Ireland
programme.desc: Frank doesn't react well when he learns that Mary is planning to sell their home, meaning he'll finally have to move out. The second she leaves the house, he locks her out and claims ownership, barricading himself in - along with Aine, Doofus, Nicola and Stephane - and refusing to give up his territory. However, with Mary equally determined to get back in the property, the two face-off in a battle of wills. Comedy, starring Brian Gleeson, Domhnall Gleeson, Pom Boyd, Sarah Greene and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.title: Frank of Ireland
programme.desc: Frank's birthday sees Doofus, Mary and Aine willing to gift him an intervention - his life's stuck in a cycle, and they want him to break free. Their bid coincides with the return of one of Mary's old flames, Liam - a self-described 'wild rover' who's never really grown up. His arrival gives Frank the chance to see what his life will be like if he doesn't turn things around. Brendan Gleeson guest stars, with Brian Gleeson, Domhnall Gleeson, Pom Boyd, Sarah Greene and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-mad executive PA Julie-Ann Rayner hosts the first dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and hopes to impress her guests - science teacher Damian Loneragan, DJ Scott Langley, barmaid Steph Barrett and glamorous granny Carol Dolman - with a 'taste of the sea' menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carol Dolman hosts the second dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex. The glamorous grandmother hopes her scallops and roast lamb, 'dress to impress' theme and tango lessons given by local instructors are enough to win her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Damian Loneragan hosts the third dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, where he hopes his chilli-based dishes, and a lemon and ginger dessert, will help him win the £1,000 prize. However, after a disastrous main course, he goes all-out to wow his guests with science experiments in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Steph Barrett is the fourth host of this week's competition in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and sets a 1940s dress code. The day gets off to a tricky start when she attempts to make home-made pastry for the first time, but her nan saves the day. The guests are suitably impressed by her home, and the dancing entertainment goes down even better than the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Scott Langley hosts the final party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and decides to take a gamble by serving fried pigeon as his main course. He insists on an 'outrageous' dress code for the evening, and unveils some special entertainment before the week's winner is announced

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Davina McCall hosts as friends Jayne and Julie, and father and daughter Kausar and Natasha take part in the quiz in which contestants can win up to £100,000

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: In this bite-sized episode, Kirstie Allsopp plans to surprise her guests with two main courses - roast beef with mulled wine gravy, and masala cauliflower with coconut stuffing for the vegetarians

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach arrives in Gijon, Spain, where tour leader Brendan Sheerin attempts to educate the passengers in the local culture. He takes them to a traditional cider-pouring class, and a lesson with some local folk dancers

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach arrives in Gijon, Spain, where tour leader Brendan Sheerin attempts to educate the passengers in the local culture. He takes them to a traditional cider-pouring class, and a lesson with some local folk dancers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An invitation to spend Easter with the Barones spurs the MacDougalls to unite with the family over a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle - until Ray and Pat upset the apple cart by indulging in more than their fair share of bonding. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is upset to hear Debra has been discussing intimate details of their marriage with her gossipy friends - and responds by revealing a few secrets of his own. Guest starring Maggie Wheeler (Friends)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is elated to be signed up by a modelling agency, convinced fame and wealth are just around the corner - but his dreams of success prove short-lived. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A stranger reveals to the Barones that Frank used to be his mentor - much to the bemusement of Ray and Robert, who find it hard to believe their father could ever have inspired anyone. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Ray end up with the mother of all guilt trips when they decide not to help Marie with a home project so they can land a prime spot on the golf course

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldon's Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa gives each member of the family $50, and Lisa anonymously donates her money to Nelson to support his dream of making custom bicycles. During a visit to an upmarket department store, Marge decides to buy an expensive handbag and promises Homer she will return it. When the item is successfully returned for a full refund, despite signs of wear and tear, Homer is inspired to buy things he cannot afford with the intention of taking them back at a later date

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is persuaded to work on her extracurricular activities by her new idol Dahlia Brinkley, Springfield Elementary's only pupil to make it to an Ivy League college. The student seizes the opportunity to coach Bart's Little League team, but sibling rivalry soon takes hold and there is more bickering than baseball

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is dumbfounded to discover Marge was an A-grade student, and decides to investigate how she ended up being an ordinary Springfield housewife. Bart accidentally dethrones Nelson as the playground bully, and Maggie becomes obsessed with a collectable elf figurine

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns is given six weeks to live, and the town erupts into a party mood. Shocked by their reaction, he decides to take his own life and jumps off a cliff, but fate intervenes and he suffers from a bout of amnesia

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After spending weeks nursing an injured pigeon back to health, Bart is left distraught when Santa's Little Helper eats his feathered friend. Things go from bad to worse for the mischievous greyhound when a psychiatrist recommends the family finds the dog a new home. Featuring the guest voice of Rachel Weisz

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bike restorer Ian and his Lithuanian-born fiancee Loretta kick off the competition in Stockport with dishes inspired by their Indian and Lithuanian heritage. Day two sees Gemma and Emily, aka 'Gemily', attempt to woo their guests with their Moroccan-themed menu. Finally, it's Tim and Luan's chance to show the other couples how it should be done as they offer up a taste of their favourite dishes

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Marine biologist Alison goes shark tagging off the Western Cape, while at the Umoya Khulula Wildlife Centre, Emma tends to the tiny bush babies that need round-the-clock care

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Old Ram Coaching Inn in Tivetshall St Mary, Norfolk, where Victoria MacDonald welcomes her guests to one of her three B&B sites

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Ye Old Crown in Edenbridge, Kent, where chef and owner Aaron Webster aims to deliver a three star service for a two star price

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Beach Lodge Hotel in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, as hosts Cheryl and Michele aim to offer their guests a perfect seaside break

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Alison play host to the others at the Farmer's Arms in Taunton, where they hope their palatial rooms will help them win. But a dusty radiator might be their undoing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores, with Coaching Inn owner Victoria wanting to get to the bottom of Michele and Cheryl's comments about her toilet

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Andy Stakes and Jeanette Hardy, who are building a new house on top of a sheer cliff on the west coast of Scotland. The pair want to spend £250,000 on a two-bedroom, glass-fronted and earth-sheltered home for themselves and their two beloved Newfoundland dogs. However, construction on such an exposed site is fraught with danger and the pair face no end of problems throughout the build, and a last minute design change that begs the biggest question: even if Andy finishes the house, will Jeanette actually like it?

programme.title: Johnny Vegas: Carry on Glamping
programme.desc: The comedian's attempts to create a glamping site made up of repurposed old vehicles hit more problems when master craftsman Pauleo tells him his 1950s Maltese bus is not worth saving. Johnny buys another vintage camper van and decides this one is a surprise gift for Bev - now all he has to do is keep the secret from her. Meanwhile, the pair head to Yorkshire to check out a possible location for the glampsite, only for the rise of Covid-19 to threaten the entire enterprise

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George discovers some of the UK's most impressive historic homes, as he is granted special access to some of these extraordinary places, delving into the hidden recesses that visitors don't normally get to see. In this first episode, George's journey begins in Dorset at the UK's most exquisite example of Italianate architecture - the magnificent 17th-century Kingston Lacy. He uncovers a tale of shame and scandal on the south coast, and the beautiful Cotswold landmark - Hidcote Manor Gardens - in full bloom takes his breath away. George also mines the history of the country's last cave dwellers at one of Britain's best-kept secrets, the Rock Houses at Kinver Edge, and finally, with his husky Loki, takes a walk at spectacular Studland Bay, part of the Jurassic Coast World Heritage Site

programme.title: The Great Garden Revolution
programme.desc: Joel Bird creates an incredible teaching shed with a front that's covered in habitats for wildlife, while Poppy Okotcha creates sensory beds and vertical planting that's perfect for any smaller garden. The team also visit the Hanifs, who live in the middle of Birmingham, but want to create a forest school that the whole community can benefit from

programme.title: The Mountain Between Us (2017)
programme.desc: A London neurosurgeon desperate to attend an operation crosses paths with an American bride determined to get to her wedding. When their chartered flight crashes, they attempt to survive in the wilderness, while fighting their attraction to each other. Romantic adventure, starring Idris Elba, Kate Winslet and Beau Bridges

programme.title: Sicario (2015)
programme.desc: An FBI agent is recruited to join an elite government task force based on the border between the US and Mexico, charged with preventing drugs being smuggled into the country. The team is sent on a secret mission, and the new recruit is forced to question everything she believes in order to survive. Crime drama, starring Emily Blunt, Josh Brolin and Benicio Del Toro

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the south coast of England compete for the £1,000 cash prize, with partners Lauren and Claire kicking off proceedings and hoping to impress with a menu of experimental flavour combinations. Day two sees Cindy and Rod serve up a similar menu to the night before, before Marian and Stewart host the final evening, which involves wholesome classic food and bit of banjo

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Davina McCall presents the quiz show in which a couple from London and two sisters from Welling start off with £100,000 and are challenged to place quantities of the cash over trapdoors as they face a series of questions, the wrong answers to which will lose them money every time they slip up

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank and Marie announce their plans to move into a retirement home in New Jersey - much to the relief of their family. While Robert is overjoyed to be getting his hands on his parents' house at last, Debra is surprised to find she has misgivings about losing touch with her in-laws

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray visit Frank and Marie, only to learn they are facing eviction from their new home - so Robert is forced to let them move back in with him. American comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray realises that the angrier Debra gets, the better their sex life becomes - so he decides to stir up conflict between her and Marie. American comedy, starring Patricia Heaton, Doris Roberts and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Members of the parent-teacher association complain about Debra's outfits, leaving Ray facing the delicate task of persuading her to dress more conservatively in future. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amy's relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurant's bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is persuaded to go undercover to win the trust of Fat Tony as part of an FBI operation to bring the mobster down after an incident involving recycling responsibilities and bribery. With the voice of Jon Hamm (Mad Men)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tension between Springfield Elementary's fourth and fifth graders spills over during a dodgeball game, leading Bart to arrange a fight with a fellow pupil. Marge gets back in touch with three friends she fell out with years ago, but she soon realises why they went their separate ways

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Clare Balding, Jack Whitehall, Suggs, James Newman and Laura Donnelly. Plus, singer Griff performs in the studio

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe achieves massive success when he turns the tavern into a gay bar, but keeps his hetrosexuality a secret to remain in his new clientele's favour. However, the decision backfires when the pub's new regulars encourage him to run for office and become Springfield's first openly gay councilman. Meanwhile, Principal Skinner falls for a new music teacher. Guest starring Kristen Wiig (Bridesmaids) and Alyson Hannigan (How I Met Your Mother)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with a father-son relationship in a 1980s sitcom, using it as a source of inspiration to deal with Bart's hankering for a must-have mini-bike. However, when the youngster starts trading nuclear secrets with the Chinese government, Homer must find a new way to bring his son into line

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge notices grey hairs creeping through her blue dye and decides to embrace the shade like other middle-aged women. Homer becomes Moe's official 'wing man' in a bid to boost his friend's ailing love life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders takes in a pair of female lodgers - who start broadcasting raunchy videos over the internet. Ashamed to show his face around Springfield, he leaves town - but the Simpsons' new neighbour is not quite what they were hoping for. Jason Bateman guest stars

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin (2011)
programme.desc: A reporter's purchase of a model ship brings him under threat from a ruthless criminal, as it is one of a series of clues to the location of the real vessel, which holds a pirate's lost treasure. He sets off on a globetrotting quest to find it, assisted by a drunken sea captain, two bumbling detectives and his faithful dog. Steven Spielberg's animated adventure based on Herge's comic-strip series, with the voices of Jamie Bell, Andy Serkis and Daniel Craig

programme.title: Wonder Park (2019)
programme.desc: June, a science-loving little girl, and her mother spend hours playing with stuffed animals and other toys, fashioning a world of imagination connected to a fabulous theme park. When June's mom is diagnosed with a life-threatening illness and has to go away for treatment, June finds a real version of her theme park. Animated family adventure, with the voices of Mila Kunis and Jennifer Garner

programme.title: 50 Years of Mr Men with Matt Lucas
programme.desc: Actor, comedian and superfan Matt Lucas charts the history of the colourful little characters who found their way into the hearts and bedtime stories of generations of children around the world. It's a story that began with a 'tickle' in 1971 and became a family dynasty - and one of Britain's most pioneering and enduring global brands

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Titanic: Into the Heart of the Wreck
programme.desc: Capturing the underwater odyssey of the greatest Titanic expeditions and the evolution of the most scrutinised shipwreck in the world. From the epic discovery of the wreck by a French-American team in 1985 to the exploratory missions led by James Cameron, who managed to light the wreck scene like a Hollywood film set and venture inside the ship thanks to remote-controlled robots, this documentary captures the unequalled thrill of those extreme dives

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: After a physically and psychologically intense introduction to their SAS selection, the obstacle for the 17 remaining recruits to overcome over the next 48 hours is fear, as they are sent deeper into the wild and unforgiving terrain of the Isle of Raasay in Scotland. They are put through their paces in a forward abseil, exposed to extreme cold in a water immersion exercise and required to operate as a team in a pitch-black disused tunnel

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: The Smutnys receive unexpected guests, Gaetano arrives in Kansas City from the old country, Josto adjusts to his new role, and Oraetta is caught red-handed during her routine ministrations. Meanwhile, Detective Odis Weff investigates a hospital shooting, and Loy conducts a test that challenges the status quo. Chris Rock stars in this black comedy drama, inspired by the Coen brothers' Oscar-winning film

programme.title: Time Is a Killer
programme.desc: French psychological thriller series, interweaving the summers of 1994 and 2019 to piece together the events leading up to a tragic car accident on Corsica, that left Clotilde Baron as the sole survivor in her family at the age of 16. Starring Mathilde Seigner, Caterina Murino, Jenifer Bartoli, Gregory Fitoussi, Thierry Godard, Stanley Weber, Valeria Cavalli, Serge Riaboukine and Fred Testot

programme.title: The Counsellor (2013)
programme.desc: A lawyer who earns a living representing drug dealers makes a fateful decision to take an active role in their criminal activities. He quickly finds himself out of his depth in a criminal underworld he barely understands, where his actions bring deadly consequences. Ridley Scott's crime thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Penelope Cruz, Cameron Diaz, Javier Bardem and Brad Pitt

programme.title: The Handmaid's Tale
programme.desc: Confined in a hospital, June's sanity begins to fray, but an encounter with Serena Joy forces June to reassess her recent actions. Drama, starring Elisabeth Moss and Yvonne Strahovski

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The meets a pair of newlyweds who instead of a honeymoon spent their money on an old army truck, which they plan to transform into a mobile holiday home, and a master craftsman in Dorset making an eco-friendly luxury treehouse - complete with sauna, spiral staircase and even a slide. In New Zealand, George visits a hilltop beach house overlooking the Pacific, and as ever he and old friend Will Hardie embark on another series-long project - this time to build a gravity-defying, rotating home inspired by vintage sci-fi comics

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Roxi and Glen are the first couple to play host in Southampton, where things get off to a bad start as all the others are dreading their cauliflower puree starter. On the second evening, Russell and Lisa's pork dish and salmon main get raised eyebrows from their guests, although the food is not the only problem as animosity is brewing between two of the women. Tennis fans John and Suzy bring the week to a close - can they serve up an ace menu and walk away with the prize?

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Davina McCall hosts as siblings Michelle and Liam from Bristol, and friends Tina and Claire from Essex, take part in the quiz in which contestants can win up to £100,000

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben, Holly and Gaston find a large egg in a meadow that soon hatches. The friends must reunite the tiny chick with its mother

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa shows Kylie Kangaroo how to jump in muddy puddles, and the two find out who can spring higher

programme.desc: Josh and Blue are starting a band

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Connor breaks a coupling rod and, after repairs, goes from the fastest engine on Sodor to the slowest with his newfound caution

programme.desc: Norman and Mandy, bored during Moose's Mountain Adventure activity day, sneak away to try out the Zip Line of Doom

programme.title: Daisy & Ollie

programme.desc: Paddington does not have a hobby like all of the Browns, but Mrs Brown finds out what Paddington is good at

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but has trouble understanding the children's rules

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa learns that Mummy Pig used to keep a diary when she was her age, so Peppa decides to give it a try

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: A rainy day in the park sees Jamila picking up worms

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: A strange, butterfly-like creature flies into the Floogals' spaceship. They notice it is drawn to the light and use a variety of little lights to help it escape

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Hopper wants to try to play all the instruments he can at once

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Build a New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke offers advice to a married couple relocating to Ireland, where they plan to live a mortgage-free, self-sufficient existence with their daughter. With a budget of £14,000 to renovate a derelict house that has been empty for more than 30 years, they expect to move into their new home within four months. If they miss their deadline, they face spending Christmas in a caravan

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Californian interior designer and estate agent Ann Maurice visits a cluttered B&B in the town of Wells-next-the-Sea on the Norfolk coast that is in need of attention

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton presents as interior design expert Ann Maurice casts her eye over a cluttered home in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire. Unfinished paintwork and dated details are among the factors giving the property a 'youth hostel' feel, which despite the asking price being lowered three times is still on the market after six months

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac feels awful, and suffers from cramps as she collapses. Justin starts abusing painkillers and takes them too often. Nikau's plan to get rid of Chloe and Ryder is put into effect

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: The two Sheilas bond over family, and Hendrix signs up to help Mackenzie move Toadie's office, but makes a move that puts their friendship at risk

programme.title: His Perfect Obsession (2018)
programme.desc: A woman returns to her hometown with her blind daughter, and is unexpectedly reunited with an old schoolfriend. While he is helpful in getting her settled back in, she does not realise that behind his friendly demeanour is a lifelong fixation on her which is about to turn dangerous. Thriller, starring Arianne Zucker and Ali Skovbye

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Lincolnshire landowner Robert Elwes, his archaeologist wife Marina and daughter Emily swap homes, budgets and lives with West Yorkshire couple Siobhan and Andy Leckenby and their children Kacey-Leigh, Oscar and Poppy

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: The two Sheilas bond over family, and Hendrix signs up to help Mackenzie move Toadie's office, but makes a move that puts their friendship at risk

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac feels awful, and suffers from cramps as she collapses. Justin starts abusing painkillers and takes them too often. Nikau's plan to get rid of Chloe and Ryder is put into effect

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: The singer embarks on a Christmas tour of Norway by cruise ship, beginning her journey in Bergen, where she visits the world's largest gingerbread city. She meets a swimming Santa on a trip to Scandinavia's biggest natural aquarium, before venturing deeper into the Arctic circle to sample mead at a traditional Viking midwinter festival in a replica of a longhouse. Finally, she takes a snowmobile ride across the Russian border

programme.title: Gregg Wallace: Big Weekends Away
programme.desc: The presenter heads to Europe's oldest capital to explore a city that may have done more to shape the modern world than any other. The Greek capital Athens' 5,000 years of history are still on show and Gregg Wallace samples as much of the food, history and culture as he can in a packed three-day trip

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Cameras focus on New Zealand's South Island, and the great Dunedin Railway's trains - the Inlander and the Seasider. The journey begins with a trip down the Taeiri Gorge towards Otago Harbour, and the area's capital, Dunedin. Bill Nighy narrates

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 90s Songs
programme.desc: Revisiting the musical highs of the decade, counting down the official top 30 biggest-selling singles in each year and looking at songs that didn't make the chart but left a lasting impression. The first edition examines 1990, with Chesney Hawkes, Shaun Ryder, Jayne Middlemiss, Paul Gambaccini, Anthea Turner, Bez and other famous faces guiding viewers through the biggest hits of the year, including Nothing Compares 2 U, Killer, The Power and U Can't Touch This

programme.title: That's So
programme.desc: Memories of the year Italy hosted the World Cup, in which England lost to Germany in the semi-finals on penalties. Back home, Mrs Thatcher resigned as prime minister, reluctantly handing over the reins to John Major and Eurotunnel builders from the UK and France met 40 metres beneath the Channel, establishing the first land connection between Britain and mainland Europe for 8,000 years. Fears of the spread of BSE - so-called mad cow disease - grew, while culturally, every child wanted to be a Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle and, thanks to Madonna, everyone was Vogueing

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben journeys to Ireland's rugged Atlantic coastline in the winter to stay with Judith, an 80-year-old widow who rejected a modern way of life for one closer to nature. Ben learns how she and her late husband created a unique utopia and discovers how - even at an advanced age - she is determined to remain alone in the wild. Ben joins his maverick host in her solitary cottage nestled in the hillside, a treasure trove of art and books she has called home for 40 years. Shunning the modern world, Judith lives by candle-light, drinks water from a well and uses a spinning wheel

programme.title: Tattoo Disasters UK
programme.desc: People who regret their tattoos share the stories behind their body art and take steps to get them removed. A woman describes a desperate attempt to erase a former partner's name from her wrist, a man reveals how he woke from a wild night out with a slogan inked on his back and the most tattooed man in Britain reveals his latest addition. Plus, the aspiring model who now regrets getting a huge tattoo of a disgraced pop star on her stomach

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jon puts his body on the line as he tackles a drunken youth in a domestic dispute and Martin turns detective to catch a drink-driver who thinks she can get one over on the interceptors. A pizza delivery driver take fast food to the extreme, Doug gets to grips with a burglar and the hunt is on for Lincoln's answer to Harry Houdini

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Sgt Carlin arrests a gang of van thieves and uncovers a major criminal operation in the process, while a late-night compost thief is caught on his way out of the shower. Officers hunt for a trucker wielding a baseball bat who has apparently succumbed to road rage and vegetarian Craggy rides to the rescue of a lorry load of calves on the A46. Elsewhere, Brian cracks down on a barbaric blood sport, Jon faces an unexploded bomb, and two fuel thieves plough straight into the interceptors' precious BMW

programme.title: Gardening with Carol Klein
programme.desc: Carol shows how providing nectar and pollen as forage and food for bees is not only the best way to support these vital insects, which are fast disappearing from the countryside, but also makes a glorious display in the garden. She also demonstrates how to create an auricular theatre - a traditional way of showing off collections of little plants that dates back to the 19th century, when rival enthusiasts competed in shows held in pubs in the North and Midlands.

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: The comedian heads to the Highlands, where she searches for Scotland's most secretive super star - the Loch Ness monster. She meets a man who has spent almost 30 years waiting for a sighting of Nessie, before having a go in a home-made submarine. From the depths of the loch, Susan then heads to the highest point in the UK - Ben Nevis - discovering why the area is famous for its strongmen. Later, she tracks down the secret spot from which Bonnie Prince Charlie started the doomed Jacobite uprising, before ending her latest leg observing and interacting with a colony of seals

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Spectacular Spain with Alex Polizzi
programme.desc: The hotelier shares her passion for Spain's culture and people, and makes some new discoveries along the way. She begins in the north east, a region often overlooked by Brits, where she enjoys a luxurious cabernet grape body scrub, and is shown around an astonishing cellar full of ancient wines. Alex experiences the craziness of the San Fermin fiesta, including the legendary running of the bulls through the streets of Pamplona, before heading to Barcelona - Spain's second largest city - famous for its vibrant, cosmopolitan character, and abundance of art and architecture

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: Autumn is a busy time for the Owens now they have bought an abandoned 30-acre farm with four barns and a derelict farmhouse, which requires renovation work by a specialist builder as it is a listed building set in a national park. Sidney continues training his sheepdog Nell, while Violet tends to nine-month-old calf Ciara, an animal she has hand-reared after its mother suffered an udder infection

programme.title: Inside the World's Greatest Hotels

programme.title: Charles & Harry: Father & Son Divided
programme.desc: Royal experts look back on key moments in the lives of Prince Charles and his younger son to chart the development of their estrangement from its earliest days during the break-up of Charles's marriage to Diana, Princess of Wales. They examine moments of crisis throughout Harry's life to explore what more could his father have done for him, and ask what the pair can do to resolve their estrangement

programme.title: Top of the Box

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees (1944)
programme.desc: Construction workers battle against Japanese forces while working with the US navy in the South Pacific during the Second World War, while the head of the company and an officer compete for the affections of a local woman. However, when one recklessly causes a tragedy, he seeks redemption by launching an attack on a tank battalion. Drama, starring John Wayne, Susan Hayward and Dennis O'Keefe

programme.title: The Colditz Story (1954)
programme.desc: A medieval castle in Germany is turned into a PoW camp during the Second World War, and used to house the most rebellious Allied prisoners, all of whom have made repeated escape attempts. Although breaking out is supposedly impossible, the determined inmates refuse to be beaten and continue their bid for freedom. Second World War drama, starring John Mills and Eric Portman

programme.title: Arabian Nights (1942)
programme.desc: The story of two half-brothers - one the heroic caliph, the other an evil usurper - as they do battle for the right to rule their kingdom, and win the hand of beautiful dancer Sherazade. Adaptation of the classic adventure tales, starring Jon Hall, Maria Montez, Sabu and Leif Erickson

programme.title: Shane (1953)
programme.desc: A mysterious gunfighter intervenes when a man and his family are threatened by a predatory cattle baron determined to force every homesteader in the valley off the land. The situation rapidly escalates into violence, while an unspoken attraction develops between the gunman and the settler's wife. Western, starring Alan Ladd, Jack Palance, Van Heflin and Jean Arthur. Based on the novel by Jack Schaefer

programme.title: Legend (1985)
programme.desc: A peasant boy, who has a special bond with animals and fairies, shows his sweetheart the last surviving unicorns. Unfortunately, a monstrous demon and his goblin henchmen despise the mythical creatures and trick the girl into harming one of them, forcing Jack to act quickly to save her immortal soul. Ridley Scott's fantasy adventure, starring Tom Cruise, Mia Sara, Tim Curry and David Bennent

programme.title: Taken 3 (2014)
programme.desc: In the final part of the blockbusting big-screen trilogy, ex-CIA agent Bryan Mills' efforts to finally live a quiet life are shattered by the death of his ex-wife, Lenore. Just when things seemingly can't get any worse, he is framed for her murder and must fight to clear his name. Taken 2 director Olivier Megaton returns for this action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Forest Whitaker, Maggie Grace and Dougray Scott

programme.title: Raw Deal (1986)
programme.desc: An FBI agent is discharged for insubordination after assaulting a suspect, and ends up reduced to being the sheriff of a backwater Southern town. He is later offered his old job back - on the condition he will infiltrate a gang of Chicago mobsters and bring their leader to justice for killing the son of the Bureau's chief. Action thriller, with Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sam Wanamaker, Kathryn Harrold, Ed Lauter and Dare McGavin

programme.title: Paradox (2017)
programme.desc: When Hong Kong police inspector Lee Chung-chi's 16-year-old daughter disappears, he travels to Thailand in search of her, where he must deal with corrupt cops. However, he is assisted by an honest law enforcer who helps him track down culprits involved in illegal organ-trafficking. Action thriller, starring Louis Koo and Wu Yue

programme.title: Carry On Constable (1960)
programme.desc: A flu epidemic leaves a police station short of staff, forcing a desperate inspector to send four bungling trainees on the beat. The inept would-be bobbies manage to increase the crime rate even before they have started work, and their long-suffering sergeant faces an uphill battle to whip them into shape. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Capture the Flag (2015)
programme.desc: A young surfer and his friends try to prevent a devious plan to change the course of history when a ruthless billionaire sets out to stop the moon landings from happening, so that he can gain control of a valuable energy source. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington

programme.title: Kubo and the Two Strings (2016)
programme.desc: A boy unwittingly summons an evil spirit to wreak havoc on his peaceful village home. The only hope of defeating the vengeful creature is to find a magical suit of armour belonging to the boy's father - but finding it will entail matching wits with an assortment of monstrous foes. Animated adventure, with the voices of Charlize Theron, Art Parkinson and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Voyage of the Dawn Treader (2010)
programme.desc: Lucy and Edmund Pevensie return to the magical world accompanied by their selfish cousin. They join their old friend King Caspian as he sets sail across the sea in search of seven of his father's allies who had been banished years before, but along the way they discover an evil force is growing in strength. Fantasy adventure, with Georgie Henley, Skandar Keynes, Will Poulter and Ben Barnes

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: Wind River (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran hunter helps an FBI agent investigate the murder of a young woman on a Wyoming Native American reservation. Taylor Sheridan's crime drama, starring Jeremy Renner and Elizabeth Olsen

programme.title: Drag Me to Hell (2009)
programme.desc: A bank employee refuses a mortgage extension to an elderly woman, who responds by placing her under a curse. As she endures a series of unexplained misfortunes, she discovers a demon has been sent after her, and if she cannot break the spell in three days, it will take her to Hell. Sam Raimi's horror, starring Alison Lohman, Justin Long and Lorna Raver

programme.title: Mandy (2018)
programme.desc: The lives of a couple in a secluded forest are shattered by a nightmarish cult and their demonic-biker henchmen, sending lumberjack Red Miller on a blood-soaked quest for vengeance. Fantasy horror, starring Nicolas Cage, Andrea Riseborough and Linus Roache

programme.title: Rango (2011)
programme.desc: A pet chameleon with an active imagination ends up lost in the desert. He makes his way to a lawless town of animals, where he is mistaken for a deadly gunslinger and made sheriff. He organises the townsfolk into a posse when bandits led by an evil rattlesnake steal their supply of water. Oscar-winning animated comedy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Isla Fisher and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters

programme.title: Big Stone Gap (2014)
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed spinster finds her life shaken up after learning a long-buried family secret. Romantic comedy, starring Ashley Judd and Patrick Wilson

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle (2016)
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)

The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa

programme.title: Chaos (2005)

Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Ryan Phillippe and Wesley Snipes

programme.title: Sword of Trust (2019)
programme.desc: A woman called Cynthia inherits a Confederate sword from her deceased grandfather. He believed it was proof that the South won the Civil War. However, when Cynthia tries to sell it to Mel, a pawn shop owner in Birmingham, Alabama, a wild adventure begins. Writer/director Lynn Shelton's comedy, starring Marc Maron, Jon Bass and Michael Watkins

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp creates some quick and easy 1960s-style pop art with a spray can to help transform Amber and Colin's living room

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Denise Greenacre has retired and is determined to buy a home in Spain. Ben Hillman shows Denise and her daughter Rebecca five properties around Torrevieja on the Costa Blanca for her £80,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Northamptonshire in search of more upcycling prospects. Simon finds some night vision goggles and an antique snooker table that's seen better days, while Henry chooses an enormous US army truck as one of his picks

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting a Norman castle, restoring a Fiat 500 and making a table from part of Southend pier

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The team investigates the unclaimed estate of a Nottinghamshire woman, but are unsure of its value, and another search reveals the fascinating story of working life on Britain's waterways. Plus, details of more unclaimed windfalls

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The British owners of a Spanish seafood restaurant try to lost recover revenue after a blocked drain impacted the business in a detrimental way. Plus, after a quiet summer, hopes remain that a final flurry of guests will offer a welcome boost to a fledging French B&B

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Miners Arms in Nenthead, Cumbria, where sisters Alison Baker and Lynda Clark hope that their eco credentials will impress their guests. However, brothers Andrew and James Widdas have to face their fear of shared bathrooms. The group get crafty by upcycling old rubbish, allowing Nigel and Pok U Regan to show off some hidden talents. At dinner, Kev Argent and Tor Johnson realise there's stiff competition from their fellow greenies. In the morning, Alison and Lynda face some tough feedback over facilities

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brothers Andrew and James Widdas aim to provide boutique on a budget at the Rose and Crown in Edgworth, near Bolton, but they only have eight months of experience, and B&B veterans Alison and Lynda are quick to find fault. During an afternoon of decorating gingerbread houses, Pok U and Nigel are accused of trying to bribe the hosts, and as the concept of boutique is shot down over dinner, there are simmering tensions. In the morning, Kev and Tor wonder whether anyone can challenge professional chef Andrew's breakfast spread, and Andrew and James struggle with some of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nigel and Pok U Regan cultivate an east-meets-west atmosphere at their B&B and Cantonese restaurant, the Bingham Townhouse in Nottinghamshire. Their guests aren't all happy when they arrive, with Andrew and James unsure about sleeping in single beds. Kev and Tor's focus and meditation skills are tested when the group are challenged to an archery competition. Alison and Lynda are staggered when they find out that Nigel bought the B&B on a whim, and have a bad taste in their mouths when he calls them 'sweet and sour'. At breakfast, Nigel struggles to run a smooth service

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Float by Boat near Rugby, partners Kev Argent and Tor Johnson run mindfulness breaks from their narrowboat, Spirited Away. Alison and Lynda aren't keen on the tiny shared bathroom, tight space and curtained-off bunks, and Andrew and James fret over communal living. There's tension following Nigel and Pok U's feedback, so Kev and Tor try to unite their shipmates with group meditation. At breakfast, questions are raised over the confused branding, and at feedback time all of the guests' facilities scores leave Kev and Tor speechless

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees Andrew and James Widdas from the Rose and Crown confront their critics about their polyester bedding. Nigel and Pok U from the Bingham Townhouse have some explaining to do when it comes to their breakfast service, while Kev and Tor from Float by Boat are left in tears by the payments they receive

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The team competes against the efforts of rival probate researchers to close the case of a Hampshire man who left behind a valuable estate. Plus, the gruesome history of a barber's shop is revealed as an enormous family tree is explored

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's penguins move into a temporary home while a new luxury home is built for them, but the move becomes upsetting when malaria sweeps the colony, with elder Rudd battling to survive against the odds. Meanwhile, the African painted dog pups venture out of their den for the first time, but the runt of the litter Mosi refuses to go out into the cold, and keepers worry she may have issues with her eyesight. Elsewhere, Sumatran orangutan Emma gives birth, and a beetle with a wonky horn has to fight other bachelors in the group to win the attention of a female

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Emma and Paul plan to host locals - including the mayor - to view the work they have done on the front of their chateau. However, Paul has first to design, build and, with a bit of advice from Dick Strawbridge, fit two heavy balconies from scratch. Elsewhere, Mariam and Johnno get their antique fireplace fitted, create a stylish sink out of a copper bucket, and host a 'thank you' meal for their builders

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets designers Beth Dadswell and Andrew Wilbourne, who have rescued a crumbling Victorian dairy in south-east London and plan to convert it into a family home, while retaining as much of the ramshackle roof, rust and crumbling brickwork as possible on a budget of £260,000. However, as they begin stripping back the old building, the true extent of its condition becomes plain, and the couple have to decide quite how much decay they are willing to live with

programme.title: Ice Cold Murders: Rocco Schiavone
programme.desc: Unorthodox police detective Rocco and his team initiate parallel investigations. The first involves the tragic death of an amateur rock climber while on a climb with two colleagues, and the second is triggered when a mummified corpse is discovered of a woman who died several years previously. Murder has to be considered as a possibility in both cases. Crime thriller, starring Marco Giallini. In Italian

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Headteacher Emma arrives in resus having been in a collision with a bus while cycling home from the school she works at. As she is treated, her husband Mick reflects on being informed what had happened. Meanwhile, 33-year-old Josh is treated for severe back pain, and 87-year-old Pamela is examined for a possible blood clot in her leg, and tells the doctors about her childhood in London during the Blitz

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 64-year-old man is brought to St George's in an induced coma, having been thrown from his bicycle at high speed, with his wife by his side for support. Drama student Florian, 21, tripped and hurt his foot rushing to class, and he explains how he and his family fled war in Kosovo when he was a child, and the sacrifices his father made to get his family to safety

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Johnny Vegas taking on guest captain Sarah Millican and Rob Beckett. Susie Dent presides in Dictionary Corner, ably assisted by Vic Reeves, and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Headteacher Emma arrives in resus having been in a collision with a bus while cycling home from the school she works at. As she is treated, her husband Mick reflects on being informed what had happened. Meanwhile, 33-year-old Josh is treated for severe back pain, and 87-year-old Pamela is examined for a possible blood clot in her leg, and tells the doctors about her childhood in London during the Blitz

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team returns to explore the secrets behind mass-produced food, meeting technicians, scientists, factory owners, growers and producers, finding out exactly what goes into the everyday groceries that end up on the supermarket shelves. Jimmy Doherty finds out how Sri Lanka is coping with a looming coconut shortage, while Kate Quilton discovers whether compostables could be the answer to worldwide plastic pollution problem, annd Matt Tebbutt is in Paris to learn why the macaron has such a hefty price tag

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty travels to Turkey to investigate oregano, Kate Quilton examines the worrying rise in peanut allergies and Matt Tebbutt traces the British blackcurrant from the field to the Ribena factory

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Elaine and Nicos Nicolaou seek to return to their Greek roots by buying a property in Kefalonia, and Jasmine Harman seeks out five properties in the island's southern region that fall within the couple's £60,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ex-RAF officers Simon Stenning and Amanda Butcher have been visiting the Caribbean island of Antigua for several years, and now hope to find the perfect winter home there. Ben Hillman helps the pair, showing them five properties for their £330,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets retired couple Denise Grahame and Roger Denis, who met three years ago, and developed a shared love for Bretagne culture. Moving to Brittany, the pair took up residence in a rented property near the town of Callac, but are now seeking to buy a place of their own. Laura is tasked with seeking out suitable homes within their budget of £120,000, and picks out five rural abodes she believes might fit the bill

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer guide prospective buyers in south east London through the complex world of viewings and agents as they try to buy a home. Kirstie meets Ros and Hannah, who have lacked the confidence to go out and secure the house they have dreamed of. Meanwhile, Phil is on hand to help Emma and Karthik, who have moved from Singapore and want to find a new family home

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer guide prospective buyers in Hampshire through the complex world of viewings and agents as they try to buy a home. Kirstie meets Clive and Debbie, a couple who are looking to find a home with enough bedrooms for their extended family and a garden big enough for their outdoor-loving children to enjoy. Meanwhile, Phil meets chemical engineers TJ and Chee, who moved from Malaysia to the UK to ignite their careers

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Salon owner Hannah hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Devon, hoping to impress her guests with a menu bursting with taste sensations

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second dinner party in Devon is hosted by funeral director and BMX fanatic Simon, who hopes his big portions and 'man food' will win him the cash prize at the end of the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Body artist Pascale hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Devon, preparing a Vietnamese menu full of flavour and colour in an effort to impress her guests enough to win the £1,000 prize money. However, her cooking attire for the starter leaves little to the imagination, Nick and Simon find some unusual artwork in her bedroom, Hannah discovers an unwanted guest in her main course, and Nick hits a nerve with Ajay

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nick hosts the fourth night in Devon, preparing a menu that he hopes represents his personality - big, bold and brash - although after his argument with Ajay, he is planning on turning down the banter. However, salon owner Hannah is not impressed with Nick's venison main and ladybird-loving Pascale finds the portions a bit too big. But undertaker Simon is happy to polish off any leftovers - is Nick in with a chance of bagging the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Ajay hopes her nautical-themed evening will see her sail to victory on the fifth and final night in Devon. Along with a gigantic seafood spread, she has also laid on a boat trip around Torquay harbour. However, all does not go quite to plan in the galley. The guests later gather to discover who has won the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the Sea Verge Hotel in Paignton, Devon, try to prove their B&B offers the best value for money. However, Tony and Chris Fulbrook's guests are far from happy, with Christine Hale complaining about the noise from the sea and scolding Chris for serving breakfast in her slippers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves on to the Portcullis Hotel in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, where mother-and-daughter owners Christine and Jenna Hale make a poor first impression by cajoling their guests into taking part in a karaoke session that runs until 2am. Matters worsen the following day, as a caricaturing workshop does little to alleviate the tension among the contestants

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Andy Scott hosts at the Orchid Hotel in Bournemouth, and takes on Richard Bailey in the boxing gym. Christine and Jenna Hale are unhappy to find foreign objects in their beds, and a spot of flirting is brought to a swift halt when the owner receives some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Orles Barn in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, where owners Richard and Kelly Bailey impress their guests with the beauty and quality of the accommodation. The contestants then head to a local organic supplier to pick asparagus for their dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw travel to Scotland to take on a 1968 Lancia Fulvia - a 1960s Italian automotive masterpiece. The car belongs to former hairdresser Bill, who bought it back in 1984. It was his pride and joy until it went off the road a few years back

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Stuart, who's 40, is admitted to hospital after being involved in a high-speed collision with multiple cyclists during a race, and a CT scan reveals that he is bleeding internally. Meanwhile, 83-year-old Elicia-Jean collapsed at home after experiencing dizziness, and doctors think she may have an infection

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Medics at St George's hospital treat three women who have been stabbed in a Surrey supermarket car park in broad daylight. Meanwhile, friends and relations recall their associations with the wounded, Jean, 67, Rani, 71, and Janet, 62

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock is joined by Andrew Flintoff to battle guest captain Bill Bailey and team-mate Roisin Conaty as Jimmy Carr hosts another edition of the game show mash-up. Susie Dent is ably assisted by Rob Beckett in the Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley deals with the numbers and letters

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Father Jack is hauled off to the local old priests' home to be treated for a strange medical complaint. He is replaced by a younger man - who proceeds to drive everyone crazy by playing jungle music at ear-splitting volume for hours on end. Dermot Morgan and Frank Kelly star

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The Craggy Island clerics face the prospect of an untimely death during the return flight from a visit to a holy shrine. Jack quickly commandeers the only parachute and bails out, taking the drinks trolley with him - leaving Ted and Dougal to their fate

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Stuart, who's 40, is admitted to hospital after being involved in a high-speed collision with multiple cyclists during a race, and a CT scan reveals that he is bleeding internally. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Father Jack is hauled off to the local old priests' home to be treated for a strange medical complaint. He is replaced by a younger man - who proceeds to drive everyone crazy by playing jungle music at ear-splitting volume for hours on end. Dermot Morgan and Frank Kelly star

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect looks back at some of the more ingenious Amazing Spaces builds where people have transformed the most unlikely types of spaces into incredible places to live and work - from a toilet converted into a luxury home to a Tube carriage transformed into a cutting-edge office. George also reflects on an air ambulance remodelled into a campervan, an old army truck turned into a family getaway as well as a double-decker bus reinvented as a Japanese-style pod hotel

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Two years ago, George meets Armin and Amifa, whose dark and dingy 1920s house in Bellingham, south east London, was not just ugly - the DIY extension added by former owners had been condemned and the makeshift kitchen was an accident waiting to happen. Architect Carl Turner did what he could with the £80,000 budget, but in the end the upstairs was left unfinished. George now returns to see how Armin and Amifa have tackled the top floor

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke meets Pip, a woman in West Yorkshire who is moving back into her childhood home, which was last decorated by her parents in the 1960s. Pip struggles with the idea of painting over her childhood wallpaper and replacing the kitchen that her father hand built, but George is on hand to offer her emotional support

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, design and technology teacher Claire hopes her Asian menu will impress all of her guests but she's got a job on her hands with former-chef-turned-supermarket-worker Simon. Meanwhile, Helen's eccentricity irritates the others, including professional singer Ivor. It's an evening packed with spicy food, a dash of plasticine modelling and a sprinkling of offensive comments

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Design and technology teacher Claire hosts the second day of the competition in Sheffield, and hopes her Asian-inspired menu with a spot of clay model-making will impress her fellow diners enough to net her the points she'll need to secure the cash prize. However, former chef Simon Hollings proves difficult to faze, and the eccentric Helen irritates the other contestants with another audacious display at the dinner table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Service administrator Monika hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Sheffield. She treats her guests to a traditional Bulgarian night inspired by her homeland, in the hope of impressing them enough to win the £1,000 prize money. However, some of the guests are unsure about her Bulgarian delicacies, and the host must fight for control when the two teachers go head to head and when Simon makes sexist jokes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: After tensions arose between Claire and Helen on Monika's night, 1980s musician Ivor is determined to serve up some fun on his evening in Sheffield. He stages an '80s extravaganza, including a live performance from his new romantic band My Pierrot Dolls

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former chef Simon hosts the final meal in Sheffield, but is unlikely to get an easy ride from his guests following all the criticism he has dished out at the earlier soirees. He also has to contend with the feud that's brewing between Claire and Helen, and when things boil over between the women, Monika doesn't know where to hide

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the musically themed Harmony B&B in Torquay, Devon, begin the competition, trying to prove their establishment offers the best value for money. Dutch hosts Hans MacDaniel and Monica van der Meij try to impress their guests, but it remains to be seen what they will make of wheelchair badminton, saxophones at breakfast and a controversial sausage

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at Chimneys B&B in North Walsham, Norfolk, where owners Jenny and Richard Harmer's decision to use a flag as a tablecloth angers Hans MacDaniel and Monica Van Der Meij. The argument seems to abate during an afternoon canoeing session - only to resurface at breakfast the following day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Beverley Conoley and Caroline Pocklington host at the Wordsworth Hotel in Cockermouth, Cumbria. They take their guests to a spa and Hans MacDaniel happily volunteers for a spray tan, while Richard Harmer is far more uncomfortable as he finds himself on a massage table. The day ends with dinner at a nearby bistro, but Jenny Harmer complains about the temperature

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and daughter Lesley and Emily Gray play host at the Park Farm Guest House in Gateshead, but while the evening's entertainment featuring a ride on a two-wheeled personal transporter goes down well among the guests, tensions simmer when the dinner conversation turns to a delicate issue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Julie hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham, hoping to win over her guests with a no-nonsense menu she can prepare in advance. Joining her are tough-talking prison transport officer Tina, dreadlocked farm-dweller Stephen, superior IT manager David and glamorous beauty-school teacher Ashleigh. Alliances are quickly forged when David and Tina discover they both love a good gossip, before they turn their attention to Stephen when David compares him to a tramp. Julie overcooks her beef, but will her hosting make up for it and bag her the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty teacher Ashleigh throws the second of the week's parties in Co Durham, she hopes a menu of sophisticated dishes - along with a helping of hearts and love - will help her win the cash prize. However, cracks were already beginning to show in the diners' genial facade yesterday, and the hostess realises she must play peacemaker if she is to keep everyone from falling out

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Call centre complaints officer and part-time farmer Stephen hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham. He hopes to win the £1,000 prize money by impressing his guests with an evening on his farm, featuring a drinks reception and rustic cuisine. However, self-confessed snob Tina makes it perfectly clear what she thinks of his efforts

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Prison transport officer Tina is the fourth host in Co Durham. She hopes to impress her guests with a sophisticated French menu including salmon crepes, chicken and posh peas and pear dessert. But having been highly critical of everyone else's food so far, will they now take the chance to get their own back or can she win them round?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final evening of gatherings in Co Durham sees IT manager David stage a French-themed soiree in the hope of securing the £1,000 prize. However, he soon finds his main challenge is to keep all his guests on friendly terms

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A woman who has taken drugs and is hallucinating causes a challenge at a hotel, and a worried mother rings for help when her child is feverish and unable to speak

programme.title: Titanic: A Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Examining whether the sinking of the Titanic was also the scene of a crime, investigating whether the SS Californian could have done more to help the lives of those onboard

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman is airlifted to hospital after falling off her mobility scooter and getting knocked unconscious. Her daughter and husband discuss how she has led an active life despite being diagnosed with a crippling illness at a young age. A 78-year-old man is rushed into A&E after falling down the stairs, and doctors fear he may have a bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff have a mystery to unravel when an unknown patient arrives after collapsing in the street. Meanwhile, a 29-year-old man comes in following an accident at the gym, and a three-year-old girl is in paediatrics with her mum showing signs of a chest infection

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Two motorcyclists need specialist care, as the helicopter medics try to save the life of Pete, while Tom may have a serious spinal injury. Plus, a woman is kicked in the face by her horse. Documentary following the work of air ambulance crews

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.desc: In an antique shop closed since the 1970s, Mike and Frank go toe-to-toe with the sibling owners who negotiate for every last dollar

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys pick the collection of a reclusive and mysterious businessman named 'the Colonel,' who has gone to great lengths to keep his identity secret

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop

programme.title: QI XL

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters and the Stig enter a 24-hour endurance race at Silverstone, which proves to be one of their toughest challenges to date. Plus, James May races against BMX bikers around Budapest in a Fiat 500 and Jeremy Clarkson test-drives the Ascari A10. Actor Keith Allen is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef begins an exploration of the country's food in the states of West Bengal and Tamil Nadu, where the influence of the British Empire on eating habits can still be observed. Rick enjoys the prominence of fish and seafood in the cuisine found in the cities of Kolkata and Chennai, cooking dishes including prawns in coconut milk and his mum's British Raj curry

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Lou Sanders displays some very unusual facial hair, Iain Stirling's beatboxing causes him some problems and Paul Sinha shows off his full acting range

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: John Bishop, Chris Addison, Joanna Page and Patsy Palmer join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in the comedy panel show hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Comedian Josh Widdicombe, choirboy-turned-presenter Aled Jones and DJ Sara Cox join Frank Skinner for the comedy panel show, competing to have their pet hates banished to the infamous room. Their gripes include Lord of the Rings, fish bones and death metal

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Broadcaster and former MP Gyles Brandreth, comedian and presenter Adam Hills and singer Melanie C - the woman who will forever be known as Sporty Spice - compete to have their pet hates banished to the infamous room. Host Frank Skinner has to choose between dislikes including passwords, £2 coins and movie spoilers

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy play hot-tub fantasy date with Anna and Toby - and soon find themselves landing in hot water. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee faces a parenting dilemma as he worries that son Charlie is getting a reputation at school for being the class clown. But is it a simple case of the old adage 'like father, like son'? Sally Bretton co-stars, alongside Hugh Dennis and Selina Griffiths

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy decide to attend a marriage counselling session. However, events soon put their relationship under further strain. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Meet the Richardsons

programme.title: Titanic: Stories from the Deep
programme.desc: Thanks to the use of cutting-edge technology, a unique collection of artefacts salvaged from the underwater resting site of the famous wreck suggest new stories of love, deception, fate and heroics. This first episode touches on Fifth Officer Harold Lowe. After Titanic sank, his lifeboat was one of the few to go back and pick up survivors. One of the people he saved, Renee Harris, gifted him a set of gold-plated nautical equipment as a symbol of her gratitude. Plus, a well-preserved alligator bag recovered from the wreck site containing fascinating clues about the life of its owner

programme.title: Titanic: Stories from the Deep
programme.desc: Exploring the high cost of surviving the sinking, including the tragic story of Frederick Fleet, one of two lookouts, whose quick actions may have averted an even great disaster

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Jerusalem in search of Solomon's Temple. When the Romans sacked the city in 70AD, the fabled Treasure of Solomons was believed to have been looted and taken back to Rome. However, it is possible it was hidden away by the High Priests. Archaeologists Dr Shimon Gibson and Kate Raphael have dedicated their lives working out what actually happened, and discuss whether it is possible that Solomonic and Roman treasures lie undiscovered under Jerusalem

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Tesla automotive manufacturing facility, where the world's strongest robots produce 2000 cars a week. Featuring a comparison with the world's first production line

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The construction of Airlander 10, the world's largest aircraft which combines elements of planes, helicopters and airships and is able to stay airborne for five days

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo traces the early 20th-century roots of the Spanish Civil War, which divided his family and sent his father into exile. The former politician discovers a nation fractured at the time by social tensions and regional loyalties, which today offer a rich diversity of cultures to delight the tourist. After arriving in Majorca from Barcelona, Michael spoils himself enjoying spectacular scenic views aboard a 1912 vintage railway and a 1913 tram. He also gets trampled underfoot at the bottom of a Catalan 'people steeple' and learns to make the perfect paella

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The programme embarks on its 40th anniversary tour by paying a visit to the stately home of Castle Howard, near York. Book specialist Clive Farahar is stunned to read a letter in which Darwin admits to making a mistake in The Origin of Species, a diamond brooch draws gasps of delight as the owner is advised of the value, while art specialist Philip Mould ferrets out what could be a lost work by Renoir. Host Fiona Bruce is joined by the programmes first presenter, Bruce Parker, who helps to assess the secret of the Roadshow's success

programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: Ffestiniog and Welsh Highland Railway are celebrating their annual Victorian Weekend, while in south Devon, silver service waiter Andy Leech runs the three-course Sunday lunch

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A fuel plant in Poland built to make Nazi Germany self-sufficient by using the latest technology of the time to turn coal into oil

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The story of America's ‘Liberty Ships', which were produced in incredible numbers and became known as the Model T Fords of the ocean

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: As the Red Army approached a forest in Poland toward the end of the war, they stumbled upon a massive complex containing more than a thousand structures across 25sqkm
